name: DriftWatcherAgent — close the drift loop
summary: Watches the drift/steward GitHub Issues and proposes the fix as a PR (Fixes #<n> so merging closes the issue) — surgical, word-boundary-safe, operator-mediated; it never merges or closes. The traceable other half: detect → issue → PR → operator merge → close.
tagline: Close the loop: turn drift issues into reviewable PRs, fully traceable.
author: Kody Wildfeuer
